untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'open interest' and 'open interest momentum' indicators which are not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Open interest is a market-level data point not derived from OHLCV price/volume data. Cannot accurately reconstruct the growth momentum calculation (rate of increase of open interest minus moving average of open interest) without direct open interest data.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using volume as proxy for open interest trend, but this is fundamentally incomplete. The signal's core logic around open interest momentum cannot be properly expressed with available indicators. Requires open_interest and open_interest_ma indicators to be added to the allowed set.
